acceptance_criteria.text: API exposes active version for blueprint list/detail without schema migration.
proof: Active version is stored in metadata_json and returned by list/detail endpoints.

acceptance_criteria.text: Version diff shows readable changed fields between versions.
proof: Server smoke verified feedback diff changed output_schema.

acceptance_criteria.text: Feedback-created version becomes active and returns diff/event metadata.
proof: Feedback endpoint returns diff and version_event.
Server smoke verified active_version_id equals feedback version.

acceptance_criteria.text: User can activate a version and rollback to an older version.
proof: Server smoke rolled back to v1 and reactivated v3.

acceptance_criteria.text: New runs default to active version, and explicit blueprint_version_id still starts that specific version.
proof: Server smoke started explicit old-version run and verified default run after rollback used v1.

acceptance_criteria.text: /dashboard/agents shows active version, diff summary, activate/rollback, and run-version actions.
proof: Frontend version panel updated and build passed.
Browser sanity loaded production dashboard bundle and redirected unauthenticated user cleanly.
gaps: No full authenticated browser click-through in this cycle.

acceptance_criteria.text: Tests, lint, frontend build, deploy, and server smoke pass.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app env SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 python /app/scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_document_api.py
known_gaps: Diff is field-level readable summary, not a full visual diff editor.
Authenticated browser click-through remains a future UI smoke.
